archimate:Representation.name: JSON-L
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: JSON Lines, also known as newline-delimited JSON, is a text format designed for storing structured data that can be processed one record at a time. It provides a convenient and efficient way to store and exchange data in a format that is compatible with Unix-style text processing tools and shell pipelines.
Publisher: JSON.org
Source: https://jsonlines.org/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/JSON-LRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/JSON-LRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: JSON Lines, also known as newline-delimited JSON, is a text format designed for storing structured data that can be processed one record at a time. It provides a convenient and efficient way to store and exchange data in a format that is compatible with Unix-style text processing tools and shell pipelines.
